title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入孟加拉国：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入孟加拉國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Bangladesh BSTI scope screening, SREDA and utility project review, fire-safety, grid-frequency, and UN 38.3 transport expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与孟加拉国BSTI适用范围筛查、SREDA及电网项目审查、消防安全、并网频率和UN 38.3运输要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與孟加拉國BSTI適用範圍篩查、SREDA及電網項目審查、消防安全、併網頻率和UN 38.3運輸要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, BSTI scope determination, SREDA approval, utility interconnection approval, fire-safety clearance, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, EPCs, and installers should verify current Bangladesh standards, energy, grid, fire, transport, customs, and project requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、BSTI适用范围裁定、SREDA批准、电网并网批准、消防安全许可、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方、EPC和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行孟加拉国标准、能源、电网、消防、运输、海关及项目要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、BSTI適用範圍裁定、SREDA批准、電網併網批准、消防安全許可、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方、EPC和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行孟加拉國標準、能源、電網、消防、運輸、海關及項目要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to Bangladesh, public official sources do not establish a blanket whole-product mandatory BSTI approval for lithium BESS. The practical gap is route confirmation: screen the exact shipment and components for BSTI or importer requirements, keep IEC 62619:2022 / IEC 62933 evidence ready where requested, prepare UN 38.3 transport documents, and obtain project-specific SREDA, utility, fire, and grid-connection review where the BESS is installed or connected.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口孟加拉国时，公开官方资料未能证明锂电BESS整机存在一揽子强制BSTI批准。实际差距在于路径确认：应按具体货批和部件筛查BSTI或进口商要求，在被要求时准备IEC 62619:2022 / IEC 62933证据，准备UN 38.3运输文件，并在BESS安装或并网时取得项目特定的SREDA、电网、消防和并网审查。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口孟加拉國時，公開官方資料未能證明鋰電BESS整機存在一攬子強制BSTI批准。實際差距在於路徑確認：應按具體貨批和部件篩查BSTI或進口商要求，在被要求時準備IEC 62619:2022 / IEC 62933證據，準備UN 38.3運輸文件，並在BESS安裝或併網時取得項目特定的SREDA、電網、消防和併網審查。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, fire authority, grid operator, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
